purpose: Authoritative schema reference for initialization.json -- the static plan file written once by the master containing task metadata, agent definitions, wave structure, chain layout, and history. Documents every field, its UI mapping, write rules (write-once except for repair task appends), and validation expectations.
gotchas: Write-once rule has ONE exception: repair tasks may be appended after worker failures
Lifecycle fields (status, started_at, etc.) live in progress files, NOT in initialization.json
